title: Last day of CHA
excerpt: Hello! I had intended on sharing more about CHA, but on the final day I'm both exhausted and invigorated. So for a happy medium I just thought I would share some snaps from my phone and go into more detail…
body:
Hello! I had intended on sharing more about CHA, but on the final day I'm both exhausted and invigorated. So for a happy medium I just thought I would share some snaps from my phone and go into more detail about the debut of my 8th collection with American Crafts, Rise & Shine at a later time. As usual, I loved meeting new people, seeing old friends and I am feeling very blessed to be surrounded by creative professionals who know how to do business while still having fun.

NOTE: Creativation (formerly CHA)
